title: alcea setosa
intro: Alcea setosa, also known as the Russian or Siberian hollyhock, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mallow family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains mucilage, which has anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Alcea setosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Alcea setosa can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat a variety of health issues.
